decisions.briefing: Cash at $298 is below the $500 buy threshold, so no new positions can be opened today regardless of market conditions. The overall portfolio is up 30% — preserving those gains takes priority. NN is at +10% gain and approaching the +12% auto-sell target, so a profit-lock exit may trigger soon on its own. Market is split (NASDAQ soft, S&P flat) with no strong directional signal to act on.

market_education.summary_en: Markets showed a split session today with the S&P 500 barely positive (+0.1%) while the NASDAQ slipped 0.5%, reflecting mild rotation out of growth and tech names. The divergence suggests investors are trimming high-momentum tech positions after recent gains while rotating into more defensive or value-oriented sectors. Without a clear macro catalyst driving either direction, markets are in a consolidation phase after the strong May rally.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場走勢分化，標普500指數小幅收紅0.1%，而那斯達克則下跌0.5%，反映資金從成長型及科技股中溫和流出。這種背離現象顯示投資者在近期強勁漲勢後開始獲利回吐，資金轉向防禦型及價值型板塊。在缺乏明確宏觀催化劑的情況下，市場在五月份的強勢反彈後進入整固階段。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors move money out of one group of stocks (like tech/growth) and into another (like value or defensive sectors). Today's split — NASDAQ down while S&P was flat — is a classic sign: growth stocks cooling off while the broader market holds steady. It's a normal part of market cycles and doesn't mean a crash is coming.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者將資金從一個股票類別（如科技或成長股）轉移至另一類別（如價值股或防禦型股票）的現象。今日那斯達克下跌而標普持平，正是典型的輪動訊號：成長股漲勢暫歇，但整體市場仍維持穩定。這是市場週期中的正常現象，並不意味著即將崩盤。
